tweets.text:
The protocol abstracts away the underlying infrastructure.

Through the Synapse Agent Protocol (SAP), it provides primitives for on-chain identity, persistent memory, and reputation.

This allows agents to operate continuously with minimal human intervention

Speed matters when agents transact in real time.\n\nBuilding on Solana gives OOBE the high-throughput, low-latency base layer required to ensure these agent-to-agent interactions settle with sub-second finality at very low cost.

The platform also includes a type-safe RPC gateway and a modular plugin system with over 110 on-chain tools.\n\nDevelopers get exactly what they need to deploy self-sufficient agents right out of the gate.

B20 is live on @base, and our SQL API supports it from day one.\n\nDevelopers can now query B20 token activity including new tokens, transfers, memos, mints, burns, and policy updates without running their own indexer. ↓
